text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yo, Big T! Listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A while ago, a kid I know asked me 
to fix up their ripped stuffed animal.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I did, and when I handed it back to them, 
they gave me this big smile and called me 
the "Plushie Doctor".

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you can tell, but stuffed animals 
aren't exactly my thing. But I don't know, 
after seeing that smile…

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. I guess being a "Plushie Doctor" 
wouldn't be so bad.
